content: Cleaned src/main/runtimes/* and sessionCapture.ts. Added foldComposeSystemAndUser to fold.ts; codex/gemini/opencode now share it (removed 3 duplicate composeSystemAndUser bodies). Extracted forEachCodexDayDir helper, deduping two ~30-line YYYY/MM/DD walks in sessionCapture.ts. Removed unused ZoneSession back-compat alias. RuntimeAdapter interface preserved exactly; no behavior changes. npm run build OK (preexisting warnings only). Report at ARCHITECT/outputs/Zone-Runtime-Fleet.md including 5 follow-ups (notably: readRecord drops the model field that callers depend on; duplicate hasTrustDialogAccepted literal; legacy migration path possibly removable; capture timeouts could route through harnessTimeouts; opencode polling spawns a PTY per tick).

Audited docs/agent-behavior.md vs runtimes/* + sessionCapture.ts. Fixes: (1) session record path corrected from flat ARCHITECT/sessions/<zone>.json to per-id ARCHITECT/sessions/<zoneKey>/<sessionId>.json with MAX_ZONE_SESSIONS=20; (2) opencode resume bullet wrongly listed --continue --session, replaced with --session <id> only and tightened later warning; (3) opencode argv ordering fixed (adapter pushes --prompt before --model, doc had reversed in both spawn and resume); (4) revalidateSession prose split per runtime — codex/gemini do real on-disk checks, claude/opencode return true; (5) capture flow updated to reference adapter methods snapshotSessions/captureNewSession. RuntimeAdapter interface, claude/codex/gemini argv, fold wrapper, session paths, multi-zone v5 protocol all verified accurate. Kill-list clean (no v4 mailbox refs in this doc beyond setupWorkspaceV5's current cleanup behavior, no ZoneSession alias, no sigil scan). Cross-doc drift flagged for Electron-Platform/CLAUDE.md: Gemini still labeled '(partial)' despite full ship status (only effort/plan gaps), and fold.ts description should mention foldComposeSystemAndUser helper added in t-cleanup-runtime. Report at ARCHITECT/outputs/Zone-Runtime-Fleet.md (overwrote prior cleanup report).

Audited architect-canvas.json zone 'Zone Runtime Fleet' (zone-agent-pool) and its 4 components against shipped code. Verdicts: Agent Pool ✓ accurate; Session Capture ✓ accurate (paths + MAX_ZONE_SESSIONS=20 + adapter.captureNewSession all match sessionCapture.ts); Skills Library ✓ accurate with one cosmetic nit (skill file resolution actually lives in terminals.ts → readSkillContent at terminals.ts:892, not in the prompt builders the spec names — but the 'inlined into prompts' outcome is correct); Agent Workspace ✓ accurate (durable + ephemeral lists match setupWorkspaceV5 + sessionCapture + dispatchCapture). Edges e8 skills-library→agent-pool, e9 agent-pool→workspace, e18 session-capture→agent-pool all reflect real flows with correct direction. Edits needed: NONE. Findings appended to ARCHITECT/outputs/Zone-Runtime-Fleet.md under '## Canvas audit (t-canvas-runtime)'.
